name: note-taker-3-1
description: Note-taking Chrome extension with web UI and MongoDB backend

scripts.wiki:qa: git diff --check && node -c server/routes/wikiRoutes.js && node -c server/services/wikiMaintenanceService.js && node -c server/services/wikiMaintenanceOrchestrator.js && node -c server/services/wikiSourceEventWorker.js && node -c server/services/wikiScheduledMaintenanceWorker.js && node -c server/services/wikiIntelligenceHarness.js && node server/routes/__tests__/wikiRoutes.contract.test.js && npm run wiki:proposal-harness && npm run wiki:intelligence-harness && npm run wiki:maintenance-harness && node server/services/wikiScheduledMaintenanceWorker.test.js && node server/services/wikiGraphConnectionService.test.js && node server/routes/__tests__/connectionsRoutes.wikiGraph.test.js && npx jest server/services/wikiMaintenanceService.claim.test.js --runInBand && cd note-taker-ui && CI=1 npm test -- --watchAll=false --runInBand src/components/wiki && npm run build
scripts.wiki:qa:live: npm run wiki:qa && npm run wiki:intelligence-harness:judge && npm run wiki:maintenance-harness:live

author: Athan Tsokolas
